name: Faculty Structured Assignment Modal
objective: Revamp faculty class post creation into a structured assignment modal with audience targeting, rubric builder, attachments, and persisted assignment metadata.
exit_criteria: Faculty can create assignment from modal with title, instruction, files, audience, points, and optional due date
Faculty can add one or more rubric criteria with points and one or more levels per criterion
Assignment audience supports all students or specific student selections
Assignment data persists and returns correctly in class posts payload
Updated UI displays saved assignment metadata without breaking stream/classwork tabs
Added or updated tests pass for validation and assignment creation flow
